workshoptitle: Build Retail Intelligence with Oracle Database 26ai

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: The Seer retail intelligence story and workshop goals.

tutorials.title: Getting Started
tutorials.description: Launch the LiveLabs environment and open Database Actions SQL Worksheet.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Retail Data Foundation
tutorials.description: Inspect the retail schema foundation and map application outcomes to database capabilities.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Retail Command Center
tutorials.description: Query dashboard KPIs, product performance, and category evidence from Oracle Database.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Unified Order Intelligence with JSON Relational Duality
tutorials.description: Use JSON Relational Duality and SQL/JSON to work with order documents backed by relational tables.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Customer Trend Signals with AI Vector Search
tutorials.description: Run vector search over product and signal embeddings.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Creator Influence Network with Property Graph
tutorials.description: Use Property Graph and GRAPH_TABLE SQL/PGQ to analyze creator reach.

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Intelligent Fulfillment Network with Oracle Spatial
tutorials.description: Use SDO_GEOMETRY and distance analysis for fulfillment decisions.

tutorials.title: Lab 7: Retail OML Analytics
tutorials.description: Inspect OML feature views and DBMS_DATA_MINING model scoring patterns.

tutorials.title: Lab 8: Conclusion
tutorials.description: Turn the retail labs into a practical converged database takeaway.

tutorials.title: Lab 9: Final Quiz
tutorials.description: Check your understanding with scored questions.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Solutions to common problems and directions for receiving Live Help.
